title: Chromium Browser
description: Browse the web inside Minecraft with portable split-screen, full history, and standard browser controls. Powered by MCEF.
body:
## Overview
Chromium Browser mod brings a fully functional web browser directly into your Minecraft world. It features a unique portable split-screen mode alongside standard viewing, letting you browse tutorials, videos, or wikis without ever leaving your game.

## Key Features
- **Portable Split-Screen**: View web pages simultaneously alongside your active gameplay.
- **Normal Mode**: Access a dedicated, full-screen browser interface.
- **Standard Controls**: Equipped with a URL bar, browser tabs, refresh, back, and forward \n navigation.
- **Browser History**: Easily track and revisit your previously viewed web pages.
- **Open Source**: Built transparently with community contribution in mind.

## Requirements & Dependencies
This mod requires the following dependencies to function properly:
**Fabric API
MCEF (Keksuccino's Fork)**

Information & Links
- **Platform: Fabric
- Minecraft Version: Uses Fabric and minecraft 26.1.2**
- Source Code: [Github Repository](https://github.com/dev-r-git/ChromiumBrowserMC)
